stories.title: Shelton vs Fritz Halle QF Rematch — Grass-Season Grudge Match

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Fritz vs Shelton. Halle QF. REMATCH. 🎾

Five days after Stuttgart (Shelton def. Fritz 6-4, 2-6, 6-4), they meet again on grass.

Shelton: 6-match win streak. Fritz: 5-1 on grass.

Fritz says he'll "come after me hard." #Halle2026 #TerraWortmannOpen [URL]

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Halle QF also today: Zverev (No. 1 seed, Roland Garros champion) vs qualifier Collignon.

Sinner skipping all grass. Alcaraz out. Every Halle result is a Wimbledon form guide. 🎾 #Halle2026 #Wimbledon2026 [URL]

article.headline: Shelton vs Fritz: Five Days After Stuttgart, the Halle QF Rematch Is Here

stories.title: Queen's Club QF Day — de Minaur, Paul, Fery, Hijikata All Competing

x_posts.label: Post 2
x_posts.text:
Queen's Club QF Day. 🎾

de Minaur (No. 1) vs Nakashima
Paul vs Davidovich Fokina — both unbeaten in sets
Fery vs Cerundolo
+ Hijikata (who upset Lehecka) still in the draw

Paul is ALIVE as defending champion. #QueensClub2026 [URL]

stories.title: Berlin WTA QF Day — Sabalenka, Badosa, Pegula in Action

Berlin WTA QF Day. 🎾

Sabalenka vs Bartunkova (wildcard who beat Mertens)
Badosa vs Noskova (Badosa is coming off her Gauff upset)
Pegula vs Keys

Final Sunday — last grass results before the Wimbledon draw. #BerlinOpen #WTATennis [URL]

stories.title: Wimbledon 2026 — Draw in 7 Days, Qualifying Begins Monday

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
7 days to the Wimbledon draw. 🎾

Sinner (defending): arrives ice-cold — skipping all ATP grass events.
Alcaraz: out with wrist injury.
Qualifying: Monday June 22 at Roehampton.

Today's action in Halle and Queen's Club is writing the form guide. #Wimbledon2026 [URL]

article.headline: Wimbledon 2026: The Draw Is Seven Days Away and the Field Has Never Been More Open

Final Sunday. #WTATennis #Nottingham2026 [URL]
